svg.text: DIY Robot Challenge — Full System Architecture
Jetson Nano (ROS2 Humble) + STM32 — All Onboard, No Remote Stack
3. Map diff: new vs prior map
Executed BEFORE competition heats — not running during race
Phase 1 — Prior Map Recording (weeks before, clean track, no obstacles)
Phase 2 — Day-Before Obstacle Classification (obstacles placed, before competition)
zone_config.yaml → uploaded to robot before heat
- id: chimes entry: [x,y] exit: [x,y] behavior: PUSH_THROUGH
- id: movable entry: [x,y] exit: [x,y] behavior: NAVIGATE_AROUND
- id: tunnel entry: [x,y] exit: [x,y] behavior: PUSH_THROUGH
→ state machine loads this at startup → knows every zone behavior before race begins
prior_map.pcd + waypoints.yaml + static_map → map_server & FAST-LIO2 init
All computation onboard — no remote stack (Rule 2.4)
Joystick used only for mapping, disabled during race
